015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.marshaller;
018
019import org.apache.juneau.marshall.ini.*;
020
021/**
022 * A pairing of an {@link IniSerializer} and {@link IniParser} into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
023 *
024 * <p>
025 * The general idea is to combine a single serializer and parser inside a simplified API for serializing and parsing POJOs.
026 *
027 * <h5 class='figure'>Examples:</h5>
028 * <p class='bjava'>
029 *    <jc>// Using instance.</jc>
030 *    Ini <jv>ini</jv> = <jk>new</jk> Ini();
031 *    MyPojo <jv>myPojo</jv> = <jv>ini</jv>.to(<jv>string</jv>, MyPojo.<jk>class</jk>);
032 *    String <jv>string</jv> = <jv>ini</jv>.of(<jv>myPojo</jv>);
033 * </p>
034 * <p class='bjava'>
035 *    <jc>// Using DEFAULT instance.</jc>
036 *    MyPojo <jv>myPojo</jv> = Ini.<jsf>DEFAULT</jsf>.to(<jv>string</jv>, MyPojo.<jk>class</jk>);
037 *    String <jv>string</jv> = Ini.<jsf>DEFAULT</jsf>.of(<jv>myPojo</jv>);
038 * </p>
039 *
040 * <h5 class='figure'>Example output (Map of name/age):</h5>
041 * <p class='bini'>
042 *    <ck>name</ck> = <cv>Alice</cv>
043 *    <ck>age</ck> = <cv>30</cv>
044 * </p>
045 *
046 * <h5 class='figure'>Complex (nested object + array):</h5>
047 * <p class='bini'>
048 *    <ck>name</ck> = <cv>Alice</cv>
049 *    <ck>age</ck> = <cv>30</cv>
050 *    <ck>tags</ck> = <cv>['a','b','c']</cv>
051 *
052 *    <cs>[address]</cs>
053 *    <ck>street</ck> = <cv>123 Main St</cv>
054 *    <ck>city</ck> = <cv>Boston</cv>
055 *    <ck>state</ck> = <cv>MA</cv>
056 * </p>
057 *
058 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
059 *    <li class='note'>The top-level object must be a bean or <c>Map&lt;String,?&gt;</c>.
060 *    <li class='note'>Collections and complex map values are embedded as JSON5 inline strings.
061 * </ul>
062 *
063 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
064 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/Marshallers">Marshallers</a>
065 * </ul>
066 */
067public class Ini extends CharMarshaller {
068
069   /** Default reusable instance. */
070   public static final Ini DEFAULT = new Ini();
071
072   /** Default reusable instance, readable format. */
073   public static final Ini DEFAULT_READABLE = new Ini(IniSerializer.DEFAULT_READABLE, IniParser.DEFAULT);
074
075   /**
076    * Constructor.
077    *
078    * <p>
079    * Uses {@link IniSerializer#DEFAULT} and {@link IniParser#DEFAULT}.
080    */
081   public Ini() {
082      this(IniSerializer.DEFAULT, IniParser.DEFAULT);
083   }
084
085   /**
086    * Constructor.
087    *
088    * @param s The serializer to use.
089    * @param p The parser to use.
090    */
091   public Ini(IniSerializer s, IniParser p) {
092      super(s, p);
093   }
094}
